milk_protein_concentrate.description: Milk protein concentrates allow for obtaining a natural dairy product. **Advantages of using milk protein concentrate in dairy product production:** enriches the product with milk protein; improves the organoleptic characteristics of the product (more pronounced taste and aroma); reduces the cost of fermented milk products due to full or partial replacement of stabilization systems; allows for obtaining a 100% natural product. **Common composition:** Milk protein concentrate, whey protein concentrate, or pasteurized skimmed milk. **Application areas:** Fermented milk products, dairy desserts, puddings, creams, cream, dairy preserves, boiled condensed milk, dairy whey products, cheeses, processed cheeses, and curd products.
